## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and the motivation behind them.

## Type of Change

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] chore — maintenance, tooling, dependencies
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] refactor — code restructuring without functional changes
- [ ] test — adding or updating tests

## Checklist

- [ ] Code compiles (`bun run typecheck`)
- [ ] All existing and new tests pass (`bun test`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`bun run lint`)
- [ ] Format check passes (`bun run format:check`)
- [ ] Tests have been added or updated for new functionality
- [ ] Documentation has been updated if the public API changed
